description.value:
Grenade or Area Weapon

You know how to cram a lot of explosives and accelerant into a small package. Increase the item’s radius by 5 feet (if it’s a burst), its area by 5 feet (if it’s a cone), or its area by 10 feet (if it’s a line).

value.text: **Requirements** A mine you deployed is within 100 feet. With a moment's thought, you trigger the detonation of a mine you deployed within 100 feet, causing it to explode in a @Template[type:burst|distance:15]. This mine deals @Damage[(1+ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[fire]] damage, based on the damage type you selected when that mine was deployed. Creatures in the area can attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.system.resources.dc.value)|basic] save against your class DC.
You can Detonate Mine as a reaction, with the following trigger.

**Trigger** A creature enters or leaves a square within the burst area of a mine you have deployed.

At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, the damage increases by [[/r 1d6]].

rules.text: You know how to cram a lot of explosives and accelerant into a small package. Increase the item’s radius by 5 feet (if it’s a burst), its area by 5 feet (if it’s a cone), or its area by 10 feet (if it’s a line).
rules.title: Big Boom
